categories.category_name: ထိုင်းသရဲကား

movies.name: Don-t Come Home
movies.info: A mother and daughter move into a family mansion only to face unsettling paranormal events and a dark disappearance. It is a slow-burn mystery that prioritizes atmosphere over jump scares.

movies.name: Terror Tuesday: Extreme
movies.info: An anthology series based on famous Thai radio ghost stories, exploring diverse hauntings and psychological terror. Each episode feels like a standalone movie, perfect for a weekly commitment.

movies.name: Death Whisperer (Tee Yod)
movies.info: Set in rural Thailand in 1972, a family battles a bloodthirsty spirit that begins possessing their young daughter. This film captures authentic local folklore and deep-seated rural dread.

movies.name: Ziam
movies.info: A unique blend of Muay Thai martial arts and zombie survival set in a high-stakes environment. It offers a fresh Thai take on the undead genre with intense practical effects.

movies.name: When Life Gives You Tangerines
movies.info: Set on Jeju Island across four seasons, this drama follows a rebellious dreamer and her diligent childhood friend. It captures the same visual yearning and emotional depth as 'Your Name'.

movies.name: Queen of Tears
movies.info: A high-stakes marital crisis turns into a miraculous second chance at love for a wealthy heiress and her husband. This series is famous for its emotional highs and high-production value.

movies.name: Lost in Starlight
movies.info: An astronaut and a musician maintain a long-distance relationship between Earth and Mars in this beautiful animation. It is perfect for fans of 'Violet Evergarden' who enjoy stories of distance and devotion.

movies.name: My Demon
movies.info: A cold-hearted demon loses his powers to a skeptical heiress and must protect her to regain them. It balances supernatural stakes with a visually stunning romantic narrative.

movies.name: Twenty Five Twenty One
movies.info: Set during a financial crisis, it follows an aspiring fencer and a young man seeking to rebuild his life. The nostalgic visuals and emotional weight match her favorite anime perfectly.

categories.category_name: ဂျပန်သရဲကား

movies.name: Re/Member
movies.info: High school students are trapped in a deadly time loop where they must find the remains of a murder victim to escape. It combines teenage drama with unsettling Japanese supernatural tropes.

movies.name: Ju-On: Origins
movies.info: This series explores the realistic, dark origins of the legendary Ju-On curse through a paranormal researcher's investigation. It is gritty and atmospheric, avoiding the typical action of Western horror.

movies.name: Re/Member: The Last Night
movies.info: The terrifying 'Body Search' returns in this sequel that delves deeper into the origins of the Red Person curse. It offers a more intense and darker continuation of the original time-loop premise.

categories.category_name: သရဲကားနဲ့ အန်နီမေးများ

movies.name: The Summer Hikaru Died
movies.info: A teenager realizes his best friend has been replaced by a mysterious supernatural entity imitating his human form. It is a slow-burn coming-of-age story that is deeply eerie and emotional.

movies.name: Mononoke The Movie: Phantom in the Rain
movies.info: A mysterious traveler hunts vengeful spirits in a world with a distinct, paper-like animation style. Fans of 'Violet Evergarden' will appreciate the incredible visual artistry and emotional storytelling.

movies.name: Junji Ito Maniac: Japanese Tales of the Macabre
movies.info: An anthology of short, disturbing stories from the master of Japanese horror manga. Each episode presents a unique, mind-bending scenario focused on psychological dread.

movies.name: The Grimm Variations
movies.info: A dark reimagining of classic Brothers Grimm fairy tales with unpredictable and often horrifying psychological twists. Each episode moves the stories to new settings like dystopian futures or historical Japan.
